items.title: This Billionaire Crypto Bull Just Called Bitcoin A 'Better Version Of Gold' — And Says It Could 10x From Here
items.description: The institutional money floodgates have opened for Bitcoin, and one prominent crypto investor thinks the digital asset’s journey is just getting started—despite already trading north of $126,000. Franklin Jiang, co-chief investment officer at Pantera ...

items.title: The world's 10 richest people lost nearly $70 billion in Friday's market rout
items.description: Elon Musk, Jeff Bezos, and Mark Zuckerberg led the wealth declines on Friday as fresh fears of a trade war hammered stocks.

items.title: Nvidia DGX Spark hits market as 'world’s smallest AI supercomputer'
items.description: Nvidia's tiniest supercomputer officially hits the market on Wednesday. The DGX Spark, which Nvidia says offers data center-class performance, packs the company's GB10 Grace Blackwell superchip, as well as its ConnectX-7 networking capabilities and software stack.

items.title: Lezzat Launches Amazon Europe Expansion Services as US Amazon Sellers Seek Global Growth
items.description: Reading, UK, Oct. 13, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Lezzat, one of UK’s oldest Amazon full-service agencies, has announced the launch of its 2026 Amazon Europe Expansion services, a comprehensive program designed to help mature US Amazon sellers establish a strong presence across Europe’s rapidly expanding Amazon marketplaces. The program is strategically timed to align with Amazon’s continued investment in logistics, infrastructure, and marketplace development across the continent, including new rol

items.title: Grindr’s owners may take it private after a financial squeeze
items.description: Grindr's majority owners are scrambling to take the LGBTQ+ dating app private after a stock decline triggered a personal financial crisis, according to a report from Semafor.
